title: Spicy Crumbly Jamaican Cheese Creme Brulee
description: A show-off jamaican dish featuring a blend of liquid cheese, spices, and dairy for a creamy, crumbly texture that is both comforting and indulgent.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut cream, organic coconut milk, arrowroot starch, salt flakes, white pepper, ginger powder, and cayenne pepper until smooth. Stir in the silken tofu to form a thick mixture.
Pour the cheese mixture into individual dishes or ramekins and chill for at least 4 hours before serving.
To serve, drizzle each crumble with raw sugar (or honey for non-dairy options) and gently melt under a heat source like a saucepan of simmering water. Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top.
